Package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

Class BeanPropertyMeta.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanPropertyMeta.Builder
Enclosing class:
BeanPropertyMeta
public static class BeanPropertyMeta.Builder extends Object
BeanPropertyMeta builder class.

  • Method Details

    • build

      public BeanPropertyMeta build()
      Returns:
      A new BeanPropertyMeta object using this builder.

    • delegateFor

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder delegateFor(BeanPropertyMeta value)
      Sets the original bean property that this one is overriding.
      Parameters:
      value - The original bean property that this one is overriding.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • readTransform

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder readTransform(BiFunction<BeanSession,Object,Object> value)
      Installs the read-side value transform for this property.

      Applied to the raw getter result by BeanPropertyMeta.get(BeanMap,String) before it is returned to the caller. Defaults to identity (raw value passes through unchanged).

      Used by the marshalling layer to install ObjectSwap-aware behavior at bean-meta construction time; the bean-modeling layer itself only invokes the function and does not directly reference ObjectSwap.

      Parameters:
      value - The transform function. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • writeTransform

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder writeTransform(BiFunction<BeanSession,Object,Object> value)
      Installs the write-side value transform for this property.

      Applied to the incoming value by BeanPropertyMeta.set(BeanMap,String,Object) before the raw setter is invoked. Defaults to identity (raw value passes through unchanged).

      Used by the marshalling layer to install ObjectSwap-aware behavior at bean-meta construction time; the bean-modeling layer itself only invokes the function and does not directly reference ObjectSwap.

      Parameters:
      value - The transform function. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • overrideValue

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder overrideValue(Object value)
      Sets the overridden value of this bean property.
      Parameters:
      value - The overridden value of this bean property.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • rawMetaType

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder rawMetaType(BeanInfo<?> value)
      Sets the raw metadata type for this bean property.
      Parameters:
      value - The raw metadata type for this bean property.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • rawMetaType

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder rawMetaType(Class<?> value)
      Sets the raw metadata type for this bean property from a Class.

      Convenience overload that resolves the supplied class via the property's BeanTypeResolver, allowing callers from the bean-modeling layer to seed the type without holding a BeanInfo reference.

      When the owning BeanMeta was built via the commons-side path (BeanMeta.of(Class, BeanConfigContext)), no resolver is available, so rawTypeMeta/typeMeta are left null and the property runs in raw-reflection mode.

      Parameters:
      value - The raw metadata type for this bean property.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • canRead

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder canRead()
      Marks this property as readable.
      Returns:

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder setExtraKeys(MethodInfo value)
      Sets the extra keys method for this bean property.
      Parameters:
      value - The method info that returns extra keys for this property.
      Returns:
      This object.

      public BeanPropertyMeta.Builder setSetter(MethodInfo value)
      Sets the setter method for this bean property.
      Parameters:
      value - The setter method info for this bean property.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • validate

      public boolean validate(BeanTypeResolver bc, TypeVariables typeVarImpls, Set<String> bpro, Set<String> bpwo) throws Exception
      Validates this bean property configuration.

      After validation succeeds, marshalling-side callers (currently BeanMeta) read the dictionaryClasses field to construct the property-level registry lookup and store it in a side-map keyed by the built BeanPropertyMeta. The bean-modeling layer itself no longer carries a concrete registry reference.

      When bc is null (commons-side path), this method runs in raw-reflection mode: annotation reads are routed through BeanConfigContext.getAnnotationProvider() but no ClassMeta resolution or ObjectSwap discovery is performed; the property's rawTypeMeta/typeMeta stay null and the resulting BeanPropertyMeta exposes raw getter/setter invocation only.

      Parameters:
      bc - The bean context. May be null for the commons-side path.
      typeVarImpls - Type variable implementations. Ignored when bc is null.
      bpro - Bean properties read-only set.
      bpwo - Bean properties write-only set.
      Returns:
      true if this property is valid, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      Exception - If validation fails.
